items.description_raw: Supply and install M25 grade RCC work 450 cum for raft foundation at basement level
Provide and lay 230mm thick brick masonry using Class A brickwork 1200 cum for external compound wall
Install GI pipe line 50mm diameter 150 running meter for water supply at ground floor
Supply TMT steel bars Fe500D 800 kg for reinforcement work at first floor slab
Apply waterproofing membrane 2mm thick 200 sqm on terrace area waterproofing work
Supply and fix 16mm thick tinted glass panels 75 sqm for glazing work at balcony
Construct RCC column M30 concrete 25 cum for structural work at +5.0m level
Plaster walls with 12mm thick cement plaster 250 sqm for interior finishing work
